agents.description: Analyzes an outreach goal and defines target company profile, search criteria, scoring weights, and outreach angles
agents.name: outreach-strategist

agents.description: Researches and identifies the best business directories, startup hubs, and aggregator platforms for a given region and sector
agents.name: outreach-source-researcher

agents.description: Discovers companies from a specific business directory or data source, extracts structured company metadata
agents.name: outreach-scout

agents.description: Scans companies against review platforms (Glassdoor, Trustpilot, Indeed, Google Business) for reputation signals and sentiment
agents.name: outreach-scanner

agents.description: Orchestrates enrichment phase — dispatches contact, news, growth, and tech agents per company, merges results
agents.name: outreach-enrichment-orchestrator

agents.description: Finds contact information for a company — emails, phones, key decision-makers with LinkedIn profiles
agents.name: outreach-contact-finder

agents.description: Finds recent news, press releases, funding rounds, and partnerships for a company to surface timing signals
agents.name: outreach-news-finder

agents.description: Analyzes a company's growth signals — job postings, hiring patterns, team size, funding, and growth trajectory
agents.name: outreach-growth-analyst

agents.description: Analyzes a company's technology stack, engineering maturity, open-source presence, and tech decision-makers
agents.name: outreach-tech-analyst

agents.description: Synthesizes all outreach intelligence into a scored, prioritized report with contact points and recommended outreach approaches
agents.name: outreach-reporter

skills.description: Full autonomous outreach pipeline — discovers sources, scouts companies, scans reviews, enriches contacts, produces intelligence report
skills.name: lead-pipeline

description: Business outreach and lead generation intelligence — multi-agent pipeline for company discovery, reputation scanning, contact enrichment, and outreach strategy
name: mz-biz-outreach
